basics.name: Giacomo Tüfekçi
basics.label: Full-Stack Developer
basics.summary: Meet Giacomo Tüfekçi, a passionate Full-Stack Developer from Ludwigshafen am Rhein, Germany. With a diverse skill set, Giacomo has delved into web development, software, and even game design. He excels in various programming languages, web frameworks, and project management. Giacomo is a multilingual talent, fluent in German and proficient in English. Beyond tech, he loves reading web novels, gardening, and exploring the world of technology, electronics, anime, and gaming. His creative approach and broad expertise make him a versatile professional ready for exciting challenges.

work.name: Tüfekci Software Development & Consulting
highlights: Development of an Download Manager as a Prototype in PHP and than in Svelte
Development of an Web Application for the Management of a Cleaning Company
Development of an Web Application for the Management of an QR Code based Redirection System
Development of Apps, Plugins, Wrappers and Apis for Deta.space
Development of an Web Application which enables playing retro games in the Browser based on WASM Compiled Emulators.
Development of an Android Application to read Web & Light Novels from different Providers in an unified UI.
Development of an API & Crawler to build an index of Web & Light Novels from different Providers.
Some Prototype ML/AI Applications which can generate Content, Images, Translate etc. which is used in different Projects.
Development of an Network Bridge between Web/Cloud to VisualBasic Application
Development of an Application/API to automate Facebook Events
Development of an APP for the Android and iOS Platform for Room Booking

work.name: RR Software GmbH
work.summary: I submitted my resignation as the project was terminated based on my recommendation. The progress made did not align with the expectations as documented by the management. Although an alternative employment opportunity was offered, I declined.
highlights: Planned and ReDesigned a Cloud/Web based Management System

work.name: planetmutlu gmbh & co. kg
work.summary: Responsibilities included developing Web2Print, booking (pmkino) and E-Commerce solutions, as well as planning and implementing websites using WordPress. Promoted to Lead Web Developer / Software Developer after one year.
highlights: Managed a 5-person development team
Planned, Developed and Managed a booking, website and web2print system for cinemas (pmkino) using PhalconPHP, Wordpress, MongoDB, Python, NodeJS and ReactJS
Developed a Web2Print solution using PhalconPHP, Wordpress, MongoDB, Python, NodeJS and ReactJS
Developed a Wordpress Plugin and Theme environment for Messe Bremen Events, which was used in 10+ Websites.

work.name: Humburg Media Group
work.summary: started as a Software Developer, I developed Web2Print, database, and E-Commerce solutions while also leading the planning and implementation of websites. Within one year, I was promoted to IT Manager
highlights: Managed a 4-person development team

work.name: image advertising gmbh & co. kg
work.summary: Implemented layouts and developed applications and websites using CakePHP, Joomla, and other related technologies.

work.name: SaveFM
work.summary: Designed and developed a desktop and mobile application using Node-Webkit and Phonegap that automatically records web radio streams and shares them via the cloud. Project terminated due to legal cost issues.

work.name: Maritim Hotel Bremen
work.summary: The profession demanded creativity and I quite liked it, but unfortunately, I had to quit due to allergic reactions.

education.studyType: journeyman's certificate, specialized in Design and Technology
journeyman's certificate, early dropout due to allergic reactions.

skills.name: Management
skills.summary: I have experience in management and consulting, with skills in technical project management, project planning, and tools like Git, Jira, and Microsoft Office. I'm your go-to person for organized and efficient project execution.

skills.name: Web Development
skills.summary: I'm a web development maestro, mastering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and various frameworks like React, Svelte, and more. I'm also fluent in PHP, with expertise in CakePHP, Laravel, and other content management systems like WordPress and Drupal. Plus, I'm no stranger to databases, from SQL to MongoDB.

skills.name: Software Development
skills.summary: I'm like a software Swiss Army knife, with advanced skills in unit testing, frontend testing, various programming languages (C#, Python, and more), and familiarity with different platforms and databases like MySQL, SQL, NoSQL, and MongoDB.

skills.name: Game Dev / Design
skills.summary: I'm a skilled game developer and designer, with proficiency in Unity3D, Unreal Engine, Blender, and various other game development tools and technologies, including WebGL and Canvas for web-based games. Let's turn your gaming ideas into reality!

skills.name: Design / Creative
skills.summary: I have a skilled hand in design and creativity, proficient in various Adobe tools like Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, and more. I can turn your visions into visually stunning realities.

skills.name: SysAdmin / DevOps
skills.summary: I'm a skilled SysAdmin/DevOps expert, well-versed in Unix, Linux, Windows, and various server technologies such as Apache and Nginx. I'm also experienced in cloud platforms like AWS and Azure, and proficient in containerization with Docker and Vagrant for efficient infrastructure management.

interests.name: Reading
interests.summary: I'm absolutely hooked on classical, web, and light novels. They're my go-to for endless enjoyment and inspiration, keeping my love for literature alive and thriving.

interests.name: Gardening & Plants
interests.summary: I seem to prefer plants that serve a practical or edible purpose, though I'm not entirely sure why.

interests.name: AI & Machine Learning
interests.summary: I thoroughly enjoy experimenting with technologies like Stable Diffusion, DALL·E, ChatGPT, LLM, and more. I've created some exciting and intriguing prototypes. Unfortunately, I'm still in the process of acquiring the skills needed to train my own.

interests.name: Technology & Electronics
interests.summary: I have a fondness for working with electronics, particularly Arduinos and ESPs. I'm always eager to dive into projects. Regrettably, my hands lack the steady precision needed to become a soldering expert, and a career as a surgeon is probably not in the cards for me either.

interests.name: Anime
interests.summary: I've been a big anime fan since beeing a child, especially during my days of odd jobs with irregular schedules. It was a great way to unwind. However, it seems I'm showing my age, as I now find myself mostly revisiting old favorites or series I read the manga or novel years ago.

interests.name: Manga
interests.summary: I was once deeply immersed in manga, but over time, I discovered that some of the series I loved had their origins in light novels. This revelation sparked a significant shift in my preference towards consuming novels.

interests.name: Gaming
interests.summary: I don't game as much as I used to, but when I do, I find myself gravitating towards what some might call "old man game´s" like Factorio, Satisfactory, simulators, and tycoon games. Interestingly, tycoon games were my favorite genre when I first started gaming.
